issues.note: Audit done, but lifecycle gate merge_provider_offer_staging_cycle is not cleared. Two follow-up issues unfiled.
Ghost migration 202604300003 unresolved; not on UTV2-864 critical path.
SUPABASE_URL fixed and Dockerfile fixed. Real residual blocker is missing deploy secrets — tracked separately by 🆕 A.
Migration uncommitted; even after apply, live (7,5000,20) may still time out.
Dockerfile work merged in fcd4ce4e; should move to Ready to Close once 🆕 A unblocks the deploy.

blockers.summary: Five GitHub Actions deploy secrets are missing/empty, preventing release of fcd4ce4e to the production host.
drop_old_provider_offer_history_partitions(7) fails live with SQLSTATE 42501 (partition ownership mismatch).
prune_provider_offers_bounded(7,5000,20) fails live with SQLSTATE 57014 (statement timeout).
All 552 qualified-unscored candidates map to market_universe.is_stale=true; deployed scorer would have nothing to attribute.
UTV2-870 and UTV2-871 migrations and proof artefacts exist only in local working tree; not on origin/main, not applied live.

missing_issues.title: Operator: populate GitHub Actions deploy secrets and release UTV2-869 runtime
missing_issues.description: Populate the 5 missing deploy secrets and re-run deploy.yml on fcd4ce4e until deploy job clears all steps and host /health returns 200.
acceptance_criteria: all 5 secrets non-empty in a fresh Deploy run

missing_issues.title: Verify production runtime SHA convergence
missing_issues.description: Hit production /runtime-version, capture SHA. Run scorer (or wait for tick). Assert at least one system_runs row of type candidate.scoring exists with metadata.runtime_version = that SHA. Capture proof under docs/06_status/proof/UTV2-869/runtime-convergence/.
acceptance_criteria: system_runs candidate.scoring row exists with that SHA

missing_issues.title: Repair partition ownership for drop_old_provider_offer_history_partitions
missing_issues.description: Reassign partition ownership, mark function SECURITY DEFINER with proper owner, or change the partition-creation path so future partitions are owned by the correct role. Apply via canonical migration workflow.
acceptance_criteria: migration on main and applied live

missing_issues.title: Make prune_provider_offers_bounded(7,5000,20) complete live within statement_timeout
missing_issues.description: After F applies UTV2-871 live, re-run the contract. If still timing out on the 8.2M-row legacy quarantine, lower p_batch_size, raise per-function statement_timeout, or split into multiple scheduled invocations. Document the chosen approach.

missing_issues.title: Restore fresh viable scoring-eligible candidate pool
missing_issues.description: Investigate why all market_universe rows mapped from current qualified-unscored candidates are stale. Restore freshness for at least one active sport's slate or document an operator-approved manufacture path consistent with fail-closed.
acceptance_criteria: at least one pick_candidates row with status=qualified, model_score IS NULL, non-stale mapped market_universe row

missing_issues.title: Land UTV2-870 + UTV2-871 migrations on main and apply live
missing_issues.description: Commit + push the two migration files, related test files, and proof JSONs. Open PRs through canonical workflow. Operator-approved live apply. Record live SHAs and post-apply behaviour. Then close UTV2-870 and UTV2-871.
acceptance_criteria: both migration files merged to main
both applied live with ledger entries
live prune re-run captured (handed off to D if still timing out)
UTV2-870 + UTV2-871 closed Done with merge SHAs and live-apply proof

missing_issues.title: UTV2-864 final proof bundle (refresh exit criteria)

🆕 C — fix partition ownership; live re-run drop_old_provider_offer_history_partitions(7)
🆕 D — live re-run prune; further remediation if needed

UTV2-870 + UTV2-871 → keep at Ready to Close, do not mark Done until 🆕 F lands

answers.what_to_do_next_single_action: 🆕 A — Operator populates the 5 missing GitHub Actions deploy secrets and re-runs deploy.yml on fcd4ce4e.
